svg.title: Snow Day
svg.desc: Reading Patch background "snow_bg". Approximate swatch. Live CSS background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, #FFFFFF 2px, transparent 2.4px), radial-gradient(circle at 68% 22%, #FFFFFF 1.6px, transparent 2px), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 64%, #FFFFFF 2px, transparent 2.4px), radial-gradient(circle at 36% 72%, #FFFFFF 1.6px, transparent 2px), radial-gradient(circle at 54% 46%, #FFFFFF 1.6px, transparent 2px), linear-gradient(#D6ECFB, #B9DCF3)
